title: Move replies on Updates to different threads
excerpt: With so many conversations going on, it’s easy for a team member to respond in the wrong thread. I’d like the ability to move a reply to a different thread when needed. This would help keep things organized. Please scree…

posts.author: dlaina (D'Laina Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
With so many conversations going on, it’s easy for a team member to respond in the wrong thread. I’d like the ability to move a reply to a different thread when needed. This would help keep things organized. Please screenshot for example.

Image 5-26-23 at 6.05 PM1540×1660 206 KB
